industryTrends.trend: AI-generated personalized video outreach at scale

industryTrends.trend: Real-time income verification systems being mandated by regulators
industryTrends.relevance: New tech solutions emerging to automatically verify and document income claims for FTC compliance

industryTrends.trend: AI-powered duplication coaching replacing human mentorship
industryTrends.relevance: Teams using AI coaches to train new recruits, creating scalability but losing personal connection
New platforms allowing simultaneous posting and engagement across multiple social networks
Companies moving away from one-time purchases to recurring subscription products for stability
